taskContext.originalRequest: Interactive Features #16 and #18 implementation with SPARC + TDD London School + NLD + Claude-Flow Swarm approach
requirements: Feature #16: Terminal Command History with arrow key navigation and localStorage persistence
Feature #18: Copy/Export Output with multiple formats and clipboard integration
Zero breaking changes to existing functionality
Full TypeScript integration with React hooks

implementationApproach.testStrategy: TDD London School with Behavioral Contracts
implementationApproach.architecturePattern: React Hooks with Clean Separation of Concerns

successMetrics.userSatisfaction: HIGH - All requirements met with production quality

sparc_coordination.pattern: Systematic SPARC methodology with agent specialization
factors: Clear specification phase prevented scope creep
Architecture focus on React hooks provided clean separation
Refinement through TDD ensured robust implementation
Test-driven development caught edge cases early

react_hooks_architecture.pattern: Custom hooks for feature isolation and reusability
factors: Clean separation of concerns maintained code clarity
Hooks pattern enabled easy testing and mocking

concurrent_implementation.pattern: Parallel feature development with integration checkpoints
factors: Integration points identified early in architecture phase

swarm_coordination.pattern: Specialized agent workflow with clear handoffs
factors: sparc-coord agent provided systematic project structure
tdd-london-swarm agent created comprehensive test strategy
coder agent implemented features following specifications
Clear agent specialization prevented overlap and confusion

feature16_terminal_history.implementation: Custom React hook with localStorage persistence
keyFeatures: Arrow key navigation (↑↓) in terminal input fields
Clear history functionality with UI integration
feature16_terminal_history.integrationMethod: Non-intrusive addition to existing input handlers

feature18_copy_export.implementation: Custom React hook with multiple export formats
keyFeatures: Individual message copy buttons with hover reveal
Multiple export formats: TXT, JSON, Markdown
Graceful error handling for clipboard/download failures
feature18_copy_export.testCoverage: Behavioral contracts for all copy/export operations

techniques: Existing event handlers extended rather than replaced
New UI components added without modifying existing layouts
Hook integration through composition, not inheritance
Graceful degradation for unsupported browser features
State management with proper TypeScript generics

discoverability: Command history indicated by placeholder text hints
Copy buttons appear on hover for clean interface
Export menu grouped logically by operation type
Clear visual feedback for copy/export operations
History count displayed for user awareness
accessibility: High contrast hover states for visibility
Proper ARIA attributes for interactive elements
performance: React hooks optimized with proper dependencies
Memory management for command history limits
Efficient DOM updates through React optimization

replicationFactors: TDD London School for behavioral validation
antiPatterns: Monolithic implementation without separation of concerns
Testing after implementation rather than test-first
Direct DOM manipulation instead of React patterns
